PageMetadata.memoryDescription: View and manage expert's knowledge memory document
PageMetadata.gapsDescription: View and fill expert's knowledge gaps
PageMetadata.chatsDescription: View conversation history between users and expert
PageMetadata.interviewsDescription: View supplementary interview sessions with expert

CreatePage.title: Create Your Expert Agent
CreatePage.description: Upload documents, paste text, or add websites. AI will build a domain expert based on this content
CreatePage.addAtLeastOneSource: Add at least one knowledge source to continue
CreatePage.expertInfoDescription: Name your expert and define their domain
CreatePage.createSuccess: Expert created! Start building knowledge base
CreatePage.createFailed: Creation failed. Please check your connection and try again

ListPage.title: My Expert Agents
ListPage.subtitle: Manage and use your created expert agents
ListPage.noSagesDescription: Create your first expert agent to start professional consultation

HomePage.title: Build AI Expert Agents
HomePage.subtitle: Import professional knowledge documents, AI automatically analyzes completeness and generates expert memory documents to create your domain expert.
HomePage.importDescription: Upload documents and extract structured knowledge via AI
HomePage.multipleFormats: Support PDF, text and multiple formats
HomePage.analysisDescription: 7-dimensional deep analysis to identify knowledge gaps
HomePage.interviewDescription: AI generates questions intelligently to fill knowledge gaps
HomePage.chatDescription: Chat with expert agent for professional advice
HomePage.foundationalDescription: Mastery of core theoretical knowledge, academic background and fundamental concepts
HomePage.practicalDescription: Real project experience, case accumulation and practical skills
HomePage.industryDescription: Understanding of industry trends, market knowledge and cutting-edge awareness
HomePage.problemDescription: Ability to analyze problems and provide solutions
HomePage.toolsDescription: Professional tool usage and methodology application ability
HomePage.communicationDescription: Knowledge delivery and professional expression ability
HomePage.learningDescription: Learning attitude and knowledge update awareness
HomePage.dimensionsDescription: We assess expert knowledge completeness across 7 key dimensions

SageDetailPage.overviewDescription: Overview of {name}'s knowledge base and activity

MemoryPage.title: Memory
MemoryPage.description: Manage core knowledge base and integrate new insights from interviews
MemoryPage.noWorkingMemoryDescription: New knowledge from interviews will appear here first. You can integrate them into core memory anytime.
MemoryPage.noMemoryDocumentYet: No core memory yet. Click 'Extract/Update Knowledge' on the left to get started.

GapsPage.title: Knowledge Gaps
GapsPage.description: Knowledge gaps discovered from user conversations, ready to be filled through interviews
GapsPage.noKnowledgeGapsDescription: The expert's knowledge structure is complete and ready to provide consultation services.
GapsPage.interviewCreated: Interview created! Let's start the conversation.
GapsPage.createInterviewFailed: Creation failed. Please try again later.

ChatsPage.title: User Chats
ChatsPage.description: Conversations between users and the expert. Issues encountered are identified as knowledge gaps
ChatsPage.startChatWithSage: Start a conversation with this expert
ChatsPage.analyzeRecentChatsDesc: AI will analyze the recent {limit} conversations to identify areas where the expert's answers were insufficient
ChatsPage.analyzeSubmitted: Analysis task submitted. Check results in 'Knowledge to Supplement' page soon.
ChatsPage.analyzeFailed: Analysis failed. Please ensure there are enough conversation records.

InterviewsPage.title: Interviews
InterviewsPage.description: Interview sessions conducted to fill knowledge gaps and improve the expert system
InterviewsPage.startInterviewWithSage: Create a supplementary interview to fill knowledge gaps

InterviewPage.title: Knowledge Supplement Interview
InterviewPage.interviewEnded: Interview complete! New knowledge added to Pending Integration
InterviewPage.endInterviewFailed: Failed to end. Please try again later
InterviewPage.interviewAlreadyCompleted: This interview has already been completed

SageShareButton.title: Share Expert Profile
SageShareButton.description: Share this expert's public profile page with others
SageShareButton.shareInstructions: Anyone with this link can view the expert's public profile and chat with them
